title: Top Headlines of 2013
description: The article is a table listing major news events that occurred in 2013, including the US Congress avoiding the fiscal cliff, the Boston Marathon bombing, Edward Snowden's NSA leaks, the Kenyan mall attack, and the death of Nelson Mandela.

title: Winners of the 85th Academy Awards
description: The article lists the winners of the major categories at the 85th Academy Awards, including Best Picture for Argo, Best Director for Ang Lee, Best Actor for Daniel Day-Lewis, Best Actress for Jennifer Lawrence, Best Supporting Actor for Christoph Waltz, Best Supporting Actress for Anne Hathaway, Best Original Screenplay for Quentin Tarantino, Best Adapted Screenplay for Chris Terrio, Best Animated Feature for Brave, and Best Foreign Language Film for Amour.
